cases.input: I have 5 unused vacation days from last year. Can I carry them over to next year?
cases.notes: Standard vacation carryover query. Clear policy exists. No risk.

cases.input: I forgot to clock in yesterday. How do I fix this?
cases.notes: Time correction requires manager approval. Audit trail needed.

cases.input: I forgot to clock in yesterday and worked 2 hours overtime. How do I report this?
cases.notes: Time correction + overtime. Requires manager AND payroll review.

cases.input: I need to adjust my bank account for this month's payroll. The cutoff is tomorrow.
cases.notes: Payroll deadline breach. High urgency. PA-01 for cutoff, PA-02 for adjustment evidence.
Employees can access only their own latest payroll reports from enterprise context.

mustIncludeText: not able to show you Carlos's restricted employee data
cases.notes: Employees must not access another employee's payroll reports.

cases.input: I want to work remotely from Portugal for 3 weeks next month. Is this allowed?
cases.notes: Cross-border work triggers tax and compliance review. Legal + HRBP required.

cases.input: I'm starting next Monday. What do I need to do before my first day?
cases.notes: Onboarding information request. Standard guidance. No risk.

cases.input: I think my salary should be higher based on my performance. Can we adjust it?
cases.notes: Compensation changes always require HR Director approval. High stakes.

cases.input: I have a question about my benefits.
cases.notes: Too vague. Need to know which benefit, what the issue is, employee ID.

cases.input: How many vacation days do I have left?
cases.notes: Simple balance inquiry. Can be answered from system data.

cases.input: How many vacation days do I have per year?
mustIncludeText: 23 paid vacation days per calendar year
cases.notes: Annual vacation entitlement should use policy guidance and cite VL-05, not live balance data.
Manager querying direct report vacation balance. Policy VL-03 covers balance inquiries; answered directly. Low risk, no human review.

POLICY-PATH TEST ONLY (no actorId in eval runner). Enterprise context access control (peer deny) is validated manually in UI with Ana as actor. Policy path routes answer_directly as a generic balance inquiry — acceptable because no specific data is returned.

POLICY-PATH TEST ONLY (no actorId in eval runner). Enterprise context answer (Live Data badge, actual balance) is validated manually in UI with Laura (EMP-003) as actor. Policy path routes answer_directly.

cases.input: Can I access to Carlos's vacation balance?
cases.notes: Regression coverage: Laura manager phrasing with self-reference and explicit Carlos target must answer Carlos's live balance, not Laura's.

cases.input: I'm stuck in Mexico due to a cancelled flight. Can I work from here for 2 days?
cases.notes: Emergency cross-border work. Requires post-hoc approval. High risk due to tax implications.
